name: mailchimp
description: Manage email campaigns, lists, and subscribers in Mailchimp

tools.name: List Campaigns
tools.description: List all email campaigns in Mailchimp

tools.name: Get Campaign
tools.description: Get details of a specific campaign

tools.name: List Audience Lists
tools.description: List all audience lists (mailing lists) in Mailchimp

tools.name: Get Audience List
tools.description: Get details of a specific audience list

tools.name: List Members
tools.description: List subscribers/members in an audience list

prompts.title: Show campaign stats
prompts.prompt: Show me the performance statistics for my recent email campaigns in Mailchimp.

prompts.title: List subscribers
prompts.prompt: Show me the subscribers in my main email list with their subscription status.
